prompt: Editorial hero illustration for a technical blog post about prompt engineering versus context engineering. Futuristic but grounded. A clean workspace where a large language model is shown not as a chatbot bubble, but inside a rich operating environment: memory files, retrieval graph, tool icons, state documents, orchestration flows, and highlighted context windows. Professional, high-contrast, minimal text, tasteful lighting, byMAR.CO aesthetic, no cheesy robots, no obvious AI slop, relevant for a serious blog post.
